headline: Media Director, Active International
summary:
I have been working in the media for the last nine years. I originally started in a TV team, planning and buying spots across a wide variety of clients across entertainment, travel and auto categories.

I soon moved into digital media, developing my skills across a wide range of digital disciplines, including, but not limited to; Video, Social, DR Display, Brand, Content, Programmatic and PPC.

I am a huge advocate of digital being at the heart of the planning process and believer wholeheartedly that that digital insights should be brought to the forefront of this process when investigating ways to develop an approach to aclients challenges. In addition, I am always on the lookout for new tech to help meet business objectives in a new and unique way.

My experience ranges from managing and operating motivated, hard working and profitable account teams, creating and managing key media owner stakeholder relationships and delivering best in class strategic work for clients across a wide spectrum of verticals including Finance, Entertainment and Autos.

experiences.title: Media Director
experiences.description: I hold key accountability for the management of strategic partnerships between Active and its media partners, in alignment with ensuring optimal representation to partner agencies, and leveraging both to drive increased revenue and media space capacities.

experiences.title: Head Of Digital
experiences.description: As the Group Account Director, I am responsible for the output of all digital work delivered by myself and my team in terms of quality, creativity and value. I  build close working relationships with all my clients, providing digital leadership and campaigns they can’t wait to share internally. I am financially aware and always able to spot better ways of working and producing plans. Creative thinking is applied to all areas of my job from looking at improved ways of planning, buying and reporting.
